messages.subject: Sync Update
messages.description: Imported preset from the original mail_in folder.
messages.body_original:
From: test2@test.com
To: sp@seaman.pc
Subject: Sync System Update222
Date: Sun, 22 Feb 2026 15:10:00 +0900

User,

The synchronization protocol for Seaman.udb and Relation.udb 
has been successfully established. All growth stages and 
social relations are now being backed up to the main 
development server.

Current DNA Status: [STABLE]
Current Growth Stage: [MONITORED]

End of transmission.

messages.subject: Welcome
messages.description: Imported preset from the original mail_in folder.
messages.body_original:
From: test@test.com
To: sp@seaman.pc
Subject: Welcome to SeaMail22
Date: Sun, 22 Feb 2026 15:05:00 +0900

Hello Seaman User,

Welcome to the SeaMail system. This is a private network
communication channel between your PC and the Vivarium
research facilities.

Please ensure your creature is fed before checking for 
further updates.

Regards,
The Research Team
